productDisplayName: Doodle Girl Hot shorts ice wash Blue Shorts
description: Composition Navy blue denim shorts with two side pockets, two back pockets with metallic embellishments, zippered and buttoned front closure, fold over hems and has loops on the waist Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print The cute statement simply zooms high when you dress your little girl in this cute denim shorts from doodle. Team this with a t-shirt and cute sandals, and let your little one play in much comfort.
